ddls:
CREATE TABLE "registers" (
  "register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the register */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the register */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the register (e.g., RW, RO) */,
  "required_privilege" INTEGER /* Required privilege to access the register (e.g., Privileged, Non-Privileged) */,
  "reset_value" TEXT /* Reset value of the register */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register */,
  "microcontroller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microcontroller model */,
  "bit_width" INTEGER /* Bit width of the register */,
  "bit_mask" TEXT /* Bitmask for the register */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the register */,
  "is_volatile" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the register is volatile */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the register */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the register was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_microcontroller_id FOREIGN KEY ("microcontroller_id") REFERENCES microcontrollers ("microcontroller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES register_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registers_required_privilege FOREIGN KEY ("required_privilege") REFERENCES privileges ("privilege_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microcontrollers" (
  "microcontroller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microcontroller model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the microcontroller model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the microcontroller model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture type */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Date when the microcontroller model was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the microcontroller model was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the microcontroller model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("microcontroller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the register type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the register type */,
  "bit_width" INTEGER /* Bit width associated with the register type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the register type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the register type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privileges" (
  "privilege_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each privilege */,
  "privilege_name" TEXT /* Name of the privilege */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the privilege */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Numeric level to indicate the hierarchy of privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the privilege was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the privilege */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("privilege_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_privileges" (
  "register_privilege_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each register-privilege pair */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register */,
  "privilege_id" INTEGER /* ID of the privilege required for the register */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the register-privilege pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the register-privilege pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("register_privilege_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_privileges_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_privileges_privilege_id FOREIGN KEY ("privilege_id") REFERENCES privileges ("privilege_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_privileges" (
  "user_privilege_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-privilege pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "privilege_id" INTEGER /* ID of the privilege assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-privilege pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-privilege pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_privilege_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_privileges_privilege_id FOREIGN KEY ("privilege_id") REFERENCES privileges ("privilege_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_privileges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "register_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "register_id" INTEGER /* ID of the register being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the register */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the register was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system mode during the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the register */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_register_id FOREIGN KEY ("register_id") REFERENCES registers ("register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_register_access_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES system_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the system mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system mode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the system mode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the system mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)
